articles.title: 5 best new restaurant openings and dining updates in Boston (March 19, 2026)
articles.description:
Stay up-to-date on the best new restaurants, recent openings, and the biggest dining updates across Greater Boston's food scene.

The post 5 best new restaurant openings and dining updates in Boston (March 19, 2026) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Five new restaurants opened in Greater Boston as of March 19, 2026.
Notable openings include 'Taste of Italy' and 'Seafood Haven' in downtown Boston.
Residents can enjoy diverse dining options, enhancing the local food scene.

articles.title: Boston Globe columnist Dan Shaughnessy wins 2026 Red Smith Award
articles.description:
"He views himself as the ombudsman for the fans," a fellow Globe columnist says of Shaughnessy.

The post Boston Globe columnist Dan Shaughnessy wins 2026 Red Smith Award appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston Globe columnist Dan Shaughnessy wins the 2026 Red Smith Award for sports journalism.
Shaughnessy is recognized for his role as an ombudsman for Boston sports fans.
The award highlights Boston's commitment to quality sports reporting and local journalism.

articles.title: Watch: Stephen Curry wasn’t thrilled about a fan grabbing his arm at TD Garden
articles.description:
An X user said the fan was booted from the arena.

The post Watch: Stephen Curry wasn’t thrilled about a fan grabbing his arm at TD Garden appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Fan grabbed Stephen Curry's arm during game at TD Garden.
The fan was reportedly removed from the arena by security.
Incident raises concerns about fan behavior at Boston sports events.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown, Jayson Tatum show what’s possible in Celtics’ win over Warriors: 7 takeaways
articles.description:
“I knew I was going to get a nice ovation,” Kristaps Porzingis said. “I had a great time here, a great couple of years. I know the fans have appreciated me and it was good to be back here, honestly.”

The post Jaylen Brown, Jayson Tatum show what’s possible in Celtics’ win over Warriors: 7 takeaways appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics defeated Warriors, showcasing strong performances from Jaylen Brown and Jayson Tatum.
Kristaps Porzingis received a warm welcome from fans during his return to Boston.
Victory boosts Celtics' confidence as they aim for playoff positioning in the upcoming weeks.
